user.title: Select Keypad
user.description: Found {count} keypad(s) on your Lutron bridge. Select the one you want to configure.

confirm.title: Confirm Keypad

caseta.title: Select Keypad (Caséta / RA2 Select)
caseta.description: Found {count} keypad(s) on your Lutron bridge. Select the one you want to configure.

source.title: Choose Lutron source
source.description: Both lutron_caseta and lutron_lip are set up. Which keypad system do you want to add from?

lip.title: Select Keypad (Homeworks QS / RadioRA)
lip.description: Found {count} lutron_lip keypad(s). Select the one you want to configure.

rfwc5.title: Select Keypad (Eaton RFWC5)
rfwc5.description: Found {count} Eaton RFWC5 Z-Wave keypad(s). Select the one you want to configure.

error.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration is not loaded. Set it up first.
error.device_not_found: Selected device could not be found. Try again.

abort.already_configured: All discovered keypads are already configured.
abort.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration must be set up before adding keypads.

init.title: Configure {keypad_name}
init.description:
**Recommended:** Open the visual programming panel for a Lutron Designer-like experience.

Navigate to **Lutron Keypads** in the HA sidebar, or go to [{panel_url}]({panel_url})

Or choose an option below.

license.title: License
license.description:
Paste your Lutron Keypad Controller license key (JWT) from [portal.ctrlable.com](https://portal.ctrlable.com).

The integration will not run without a valid license. After saving, the entry reloads and the license is validated.

This Home Assistant instance ID (for instance-bound licenses): `{instance_id}`

buttons.title: Configure All Buttons — {keypad_name}
buttons.description: Set a label and action type for each button. {raise_lower_note}{led_bindings}

entities.title: Assign Entities — {keypad_name}
entities.description: Select the target entity for each active button. Leave the LED Switch field empty to use the auto-discovered binding.{led_bindings}
